# birt ![](reference/figures/logo.png)

**birt** (Bayesian IRT) fits Item Response Theory models using Bayesian
estimation via [CmdStan](https://mc-stan.org/users/interfaces/cmdstan).
Stan models are pre-compiled during package installation using the
[instantiate](https://wlandau.github.io/instantiate/) package, so there
is no compilation delay at runtime.

Supported models:

| Model | Function | Item Parameters |
|----|----|----|
| Rasch (1PL) | [`rasch_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/rasch_fit.md) | difficulty |
| 2PL | [`twopl_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/twopl_fit.md) | difficulty + discrimination |
| 3PL | [`threepl_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/threepl_fit.md) | difficulty + discrimination + guessing |

All priors are user-configurable. Sensible defaults are provided based
on the Stan User’s Guide.

## Installation

``` r
# 1. Install cmdstanr
install.packages("cmdstanr", repos = c(
  "https://stan-dev.r-universe.dev/",
  getOption("repos")
))

# 2. Install CmdStan
cmdstanr::install_cmdstan()

# 3. Install birt (from source to trigger Stan compilation)
pak::pak("Ndukaboika/birt")
```

## Quick Example

``` r
library(birt)

# Simulate data
sim <- rasch_simulate(J = 300, K = 10, seed = 42)

# Fit a Rasch model
fit <- rasch_fit(sim$data, seed = 123)
fit
summary(fit)

# Extract parameters
item_params(fit)
delta_param(fit)

# Plots
plot(fit, type = "icc")
plot(fit, type = "wright")
plot(fit, type = "info")

# Diagnostics
item_fit(fit)
```

## Custom Priors

Every prior can be overridden:

``` r
fit <- rasch_fit(data,
  prior_delta    = c(0, 2),       # Normal(0, 2) for mean ability
  prior_alpha_sd = 2,             # Normal(0, 2) for ability deviations
  prior_beta_sd  = 2,             # Normal(0, 2) for item difficulties
  seed = 123
)

# 3PL for 4-option multiple choice
fit3 <- threepl_fit(data,
  prior_c = c(5, 15),             # Beta(5, 15), mean = 0.25
  seed = 123
)
```

## Real Data

``` r
data(algebra)
fit <- rasch_fit(algebra, seed = 123)
summary(fit)
plot(fit, type = "wright")
```

## Learn More

- [Getting Started
  vignette](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/articles/getting-started.html)
- [Function reference](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/)
- [Prior distributions
  guide](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/articles/getting-started.html#prior-distributions)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`algebra`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/algebra.md) :
  Student Assessment Dataset
- [`delta_param()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/delta_param.md)
  : Extract the Mean Ability Estimate (delta)
- [`discrim_params()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/discrim_params.md)
  : Extract Discrimination Estimates (a)
- [`guessing_params()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/guessing_params.md)
  : Extract Guessing Parameter Estimates (c)
- [`item_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/item_fit.md)
  : Item Fit Statistics (Outfit and Infit)
- [`item_params()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/item_params.md)
  : Extract Item Difficulty Estimates (beta)
- [`person_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/person_fit.md)
  : Person Fit Statistics
- [`person_params()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/person_params.md)
  : Extract Student Ability Estimates (alpha + delta)
- [`plot(`*`<birt_fit>`*`)`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/plot.birt_fit.md)
  : Plot a Rasch Model Fit
- [`plot_icc()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/plot_icc.md)
  : Plot Item Characteristic Curves (ICCs)
- [`plot_info()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/plot_info.md)
  : Test Information Function
- [`plot_wright_map()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/plot_wright_map.md)
  : Wright Map (Item-Person Map)
- [`ppc_rasch()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/ppc_rasch.md)
  : Posterior Predictive Check for Rasch Model
- [`print(`*`<birt_fit>`*`)`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/print.birt_fit.md)
  : Print a Rasch Model Fit
- [`rasch_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/rasch_fit.md)
  : Fit a Bayesian Rasch (1PL) IRT Model
- [`rasch_simulate()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/rasch_simulate.md)
  : Simulate Data from a Rasch Model
- [`summary(`*`<birt_fit>`*`)`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/summary.birt_fit.md)
  : Summarize a Rasch Model Fit
- [`threepl_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/threepl_fit.md)
  : Fit a 3PL IRT Model
- [`twopl_fit()`](https://ndukaboika.github.io/birt/reference/twopl_fit.md)
  : Fit a 2PL IRT Model
